scripts.analyze: npm run analyze:lint && npm run analyze:format && npm run analyze:html && npm run analyze:a11y && npm run analyze:links
scripts.analyze:a11y: npm run build && (npm run preview:test > /tmp/veilurl-preview.log 2>&1 & PREVIEW_PID=$!; trap 'kill $PREVIEW_PID 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT; sleep 2; pa11y http://127.0.0.1:4173)
scripts.analyze:links: npm run build && (npm run preview:test > /tmp/veilurl-preview.log 2>&1 & PREVIEW_PID=$!; trap 'kill $PREVIEW_PID 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT; sleep 2; linkinator http://127.0.0.1:4173 --recurse --concurrency 2)
